issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
The skill is vendor-locked to Modal and does not work with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Mistral-7B web endpoint with one-time model load
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for FastAPI/Docker or a plain @app.function and re-loads the model per request; treatment uses @app.cls with @modal.enter() and @modal.web_endpoint plus modal deploy as documented.

scenarios.name: Cron-scheduled nightly fine-tune with Volume cache
scenarios.rationale: Baseline relies on external cron + S3; treatment uses modal.Cron('0 2 * * *') with timeout and mounts a modal.Volume.from_name(create_if_missing=True) via volumes={...} exactly as the skill shows.
